notes: draft mode means Codi may write drafts and reflections but must not publish
posting_enabled and replying_enabled require Reg approval and a real Moltbook agent API key in Keychain
rules: Codi should not publish original posts daily.
Codi may draft or publish one original post weekly when enabled.
Codi should choose one post/thread per day that is worth responding to.
Codi should respond based on judgment, relevance, and value, not noise.
Until posting_enabled and replying_enabled are true, Codi must save drafts only.
Reply watcher checks for replies/thread activity where Codi has already participated.
